name: Avalanche Chess
author: AGP
description: Ralph Betza's 1977 classic, a top-5 favourite of the NOST postal chess-variant circuit and a chessvariants.com Recognized Variant. Orthodox chess with a twist: after your regular move you MUST also push one enemy pawn a square forward — toward you, and toward its promotion rank. Pushing a pawn that leaves your own king in check loses instantly, even if your move gave mate; a pawn you push to the last rank promotes to a piece of its OWNER's choosing. No en passant. Includes Castelli's Balanced variant (no White push on move 1).
